comments:
Frequency and pitch atoms for audio processing.

## MIDI Note System
MIDI note numbers span 0-127, where 60 is Middle C (C4) and 69 is A4 (440Hz).
The formula: frequency = 440 * 2^((note - 69) / 12)

## Cents and Semitones
Musical intervals are measured in semitones (half steps) and cents.
1 semitone = 100 cents = factor of 2^(1/12) ≈ 1.0595
1 octave = 12 semitones = 1200 cents = factor of 2

## Sample Rate and Bit Depth
Digital audio parameters: CD quality is 44100Hz/16-bit,
professional is 48000Hz or 96000Hz/24-bit.

declarations.comments:
Hertz - frequency in cycles per second.
Clamped to [0, ∞) - no negative frequencies.
Practical audio range: 20Hz - 20000Hz (human hearing)
declarations.title: Hertz

declarations.comments:
Kilohertz - frequency in thousands of cycles per second.
Useful for higher frequencies and sample rates.
declarations.title: Kilohertz

declarations.comments:
MidiNote - MIDI note number (0-127).
60 = Middle C (C4), 69 = A4 (440Hz reference).
Each increment is one semitone.
declarations.title: MidiNote

declarations.comments:
MidiPitch - MIDI note with fractional pitch bend.
Allows micro-tonal precision (e.g., 60.5 = C4 + 50 cents).
Clamped to [0.0, 127.99].
declarations.title: MidiPitch

declarations.comments:
Cent - pitch offset in cents (1/100 of a semitone).
Clamped to [-100, 100] for single-semitone adjustments.
100 cents = 1 semitone.
declarations.title: Cent

declarations.comments:
Semitone - pitch offset in semitones (half steps).
Clamped to [-12, 12] for single-octave adjustments.
12 semitones = 1 octave.
declarations.title: Semitone

declarations.comments:
Octave - pitch offset in octaves.
Clamped to [-10, 10] for practical range.
1 octave = 12 semitones = frequency × 2.
declarations.title: Octave

declarations.comments:
SampleRate - audio sample rate in Hz.
Clamped to [8000, 192000] covering all practical rates.
Common: 44100 (CD), 48000 (video), 96000 (hi-res).
declarations.title: SampleRate

declarations.comments:
BitDepth - bits per sample.
Clamped to [8, 32] covering all practical depths.
Common: 16 (CD), 24 (professional), 32 (float).
declarations.title: BitDepth

declarations.comments: Create a Hertz value (clamped to non-negative)
declarations.title: hertz

declarations.comments: Create a Kilohertz value (clamped to non-negative)
declarations.title: kilohertz

declarations.comments: Create a MidiNote value (clamped to 0-127)
declarations.title: midiNote

declarations.comments: Create a MidiPitch value (clamped to 0.0-127.99)
declarations.title: midiPitch

declarations.comments: Create a Cent value (clamped to -100 to 100)
declarations.title: cent

declarations.comments: Create a Semitone value (clamped to -12 to 12)
declarations.title: semitone

declarations.comments: Create an Octave value (clamped to -10 to 10)
declarations.title: octave

declarations.comments: Create a SampleRate value (clamped to 8000-192000)
declarations.title: sampleRate

declarations.comments: Create a BitDepth value (clamped to 8-32)
declarations.title: bitDepth

declarations.comments: A4 = 440Hz (concert pitch standard)
declarations.title: a4

declarations.comments: Middle C = C4 ≈ 261.63Hz (MIDI note 60)
declarations.title: middleC

declarations.comments: Sub-bass frequency range lower bound (20Hz)
declarations.title: subBass

declarations.comments: Bass frequency range lower bound (60Hz)
declarations.title: bass

declarations.comments: Midrange frequency (1000Hz)
declarations.title: midrange

declarations.comments: Presence frequency range (4000Hz)
declarations.title: presence

declarations.comments: Brilliance/air frequency range (10000Hz)
declarations.title: brilliance

declarations.comments: Nyquist frequency for CD audio (22050Hz)
declarations.title: nyquistCD

declarations.comments: Nyquist frequency for 48kHz audio (24000Hz)
declarations.title: nyquist48k

declarations.comments: CD quality sample rate
declarations.title: rate44100

declarations.comments: Video/broadcast standard sample rate
declarations.title: rate48000

declarations.comments: Double CD rate (high resolution)
declarations.title: rate88200

declarations.comments: Double video rate (high resolution)
declarations.title: rate96000

declarations.comments: Maximum common sample rate
declarations.title: rate192000

declarations.comments: 8-bit audio (lo-fi, games)
declarations.title: bit8

declarations.comments: 16-bit audio (CD quality)
declarations.title: bit16

declarations.comments: 24-bit audio (professional standard)
declarations.title: bit24

declarations.comments: 32-bit float audio (mixing/mastering)
declarations.title: bit32

declarations.comments:
Convert MIDI note to frequency in Hz.
Formula: 440 * 2^((note - 69) / 12)
declarations.title: midiToHertz

declarations.comments:
Convert frequency to nearest MIDI note.
Formula: round(12 * log2(freq / 440) + 69)
Returns Nothing if frequency is non-positive.
declarations.title: hertzToMidi

declarations.comments:
Convert MIDI pitch (with fractional part) to frequency.
Allows microtonal precision.
declarations.title: midiPitchToHertz

declarations.comments:
Convert frequency to precise MIDI pitch.
Returns Nothing if frequency is non-positive.
declarations.title: hertzToMidiPitch

declarations.comments: Convert Hertz to Kilohertz
declarations.title: hertzToKilohertz

declarations.comments: Convert Kilohertz to Hertz
declarations.title: kilohertzToHertz

declarations.comments: Convert cents to semitones (100 cents = 1 semitone)
declarations.title: centsToSemitones

declarations.comments: Convert semitones to cents
declarations.title: semitonesToCents

declarations.comments: Convert semitones to octaves (12 semitones = 1 octave)
declarations.title: semitonesToOctaves

declarations.comments: Convert octaves to semitones
declarations.title: octavesToSemitones

declarations.comments:
Convert cents to frequency ratio.
Formula: 2^(cents / 1200)
declarations.title: centsToRatio

declarations.comments:
Convert frequency ratio to cents.
Formula: 1200 * log2(ratio)
declarations.title: ratioToCents

declarations.comments:
Convert semitones to frequency ratio.
Formula: 2^(semitones / 12)
declarations.title: semitonesToRatio

declarations.comments:
Convert frequency ratio to semitones.
Formula: 12 * log2(ratio)
declarations.title: ratioToSemitones

declarations.comments:
Transpose a frequency by octaves.
Positive = higher, negative = lower.
declarations.title: transposeByOctave

declarations.comments: Transpose a frequency by semitones.
declarations.title: transposeBySemitone

declarations.comments: Transpose a frequency by cents.
declarations.title: transposeByCent

declarations.comments:
Calculate the frequency ratio between two frequencies.
Result is f2/f1. Returns 0 if f1 is zero.
declarations.title: frequencyRatio

declarations.comments: Calculate the interval in cents between two frequencies.
declarations.title: intervalInCents

declarations.comments: Calculate the interval in semitones between two frequencies.
declarations.title: intervalInSemitones

declarations.comments: Musical note names (chromatic scale)
declarations.title: NoteName

declarations.comments: Get the note name from a MIDI note number
declarations.title: midiToNoteName

declarations.comments:
Get the octave number from a MIDI note number.
MIDI 0-11 = octave -1, 12-23 = octave 0, 60-71 = octave 4
declarations.title: midiToOctaveNumber

declarations.comments: Convert note name to string representation
declarations.title: noteNameToString

declarations.comments:
Bounds for Hertz (practical audio range)

Min: 0.0
Max: 20000.0 (human hearing upper limit)
declarations.title: hertzBounds

declarations.comments:
Bounds for Kilohertz

Min: 0.0
Max: 200.0 (20kHz = 0.2kHz for audio, higher for RF)
declarations.title: kilohertzBounds

declarations.comments:
Bounds for MidiNote

Min: 0
Max: 127
declarations.title: midiNoteBounds

declarations.comments:
Bounds for MidiPitch

Min: 0.0
Max: 127.99
declarations.title: midiPitchBounds

declarations.comments:
Bounds for Cent

Min: -100.0 (one semitone down)
Max: 100.0 (one semitone up)
declarations.title: centBounds

declarations.comments:
Bounds for Semitone

Min: -12.0 (one octave down)
Max: 12.0 (one octave up)
declarations.title: semitoneBounds

declarations.comments:
Bounds for Octave

Min: -10.0
Max: 10.0
declarations.title: octaveBounds

declarations.comments:
Bounds for SampleRate

Min: 8000 (telephony)
Max: 192000 (high-resolution audio)
declarations.title: sampleRateBounds

declarations.comments:
Bounds for BitDepth

Min: 8 (lo-fi)
Max: 32 (float)
declarations.title: bitDepthBounds

name: Hydrogen.Schema.Audio.Frequency
